# feat(m2): convert all 8 exercises to R10 directory structure

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `32a13cb693f0` — feat(m2): convert all 8 exercises to R10 directory structure

**Body**:

Per-technique files with 5-phase narrative.

Exercises:
  ex_1: 4 files (probability/MLE, Bayes theorem, conjugate priors, intervals)
  ex_2: 5 files (CLT/sampling, MLE/Fisher, MAP, MLE failures, model selection)
  ex_3: 4 files (bootstrap/power, hypothesis testing, multiple testing, permutation)
  ex_4: 4 files (experiment design, SRM, Welch's t-test, validity/adaptive)
  ex_5: 4 files (OLS from scratch, diagnostics, WLS, model enrichment)
  ex_6: 4 files (logistic from scratch, interpretation, metrics, calibration/ANOVA)
  ex_7: 4 files (CUPED, Bayesian A/B, sequential testing, DiD)
  ex_8: 4 files (feature schema, point-in-time, rolling features, modeling/lineage)

Total: 33 technique files × 3 formats + 8 shared modules.
